title: External raw path in Switching_main.m
detail: Raw parentDir is an absolute L: Google Drive path embedded in legacy file; reproducibility across machines depends on that file and drive availability

title: Legacy processing stack
detail: S definition is fully determined by Switching ver12 functions not duplicated in Switching/analysis; scientific interpretation ties to their behavior

title: createRunContext under Aging/utils
detail: Execution identity utility lives outside Switching tree; strict which() check prevents wrong copy

title: Optional preset normalization
detail: normalize_to may change if resolve_preset/select_preset behavior or filenames change

title: CHECK_NO_PRECOMPUTED_INPUTS heuristic
detail: Flags precomputed if any input path ends with .csv/.mat or contains \\results\\; false negatives/positives possible if paths unusual

title: PHI/KAPPA gates vs physics
detail: CANONICAL_PIPELINE_CONFIRMED uses RMSE/cosine/Spearman thresholds; descriptive of fit not independent validation
